det_check_template:
proof fn det_pop<T: Copy, const N: usize>(pre_self_: StaticLinkedList<T, N>, post1_self_: StaticLinkedList<T, N>, r1: (T, SLLIndex), post2_self_: StaticLinkedList<T, N>, r2: (T, SLLIndex))
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.len() > 0), (pre_self_.unique()), (N > 2),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.len() == pre_self_.len() - 1)
            &&& (post1_self_@ == pre_self_@.skip(1))
            &&& (r1.0 == pre_self_@[0])
            &&& (r1.1 == pre_self_.get_node_ref(r1.0))
            &&& (forall|v:T|
                #![auto]
                post1_self_@.contains(v) ==> 
                    pre_self_.get_node_ref(v) == 
                        post1_self_.get_node_ref(v))
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.len() == pre_self_.len() - 1)
            &&& (post2_self_@ == pre_self_@.skip(1))
            &&& (r2.0 == pre_self_@[0])
            &&& (r2.1 == pre_self_.get_node_ref(r2.0))
            &&& (forall|v:T|
                #![auto]
                post2_self_@.contains(v) ==> 
                    pre_self_.get_node_ref(v) == 
                        post2_self_.get_node_ref(v))
        }) ==> det_pop_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
